description: Case dimensions: 25 mm x 20 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: RectangularSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlue leather strap and a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite coloured dial brand logo at 9 hour mark and branding at 6 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
